name: intentops-harness
description: An auditable AI DevOps agent for turning developer notes, issues, and logs into intent, evaluated action plans, and safe execution records.

scripts.check: node --input-type=module -e "import('./packages/core/intentops.js').then(({ runHarness }) => { const result = runHarness('CI failing. README needs update. Draft GitHub issue after approval.'); if (!result.ledgerEntry.hash || !result.selected.id) process.exit(1); console.log('intentops core ok:', result.selected.id, result.consent.status, result.ledgerEntry.hash); })"
